mapper.select: /* SQL ID : SysAuthGrpDAO.listInUser 설 명 : 해당 사용자가 부여 받은 권한 목록 */ SELECT MENU_TYCD as menuType , USER_AUTHRT_ID as authGrpCd , AUTHRT_GRPNM as authGrpNm , USEYN as useYn , AUTHRT_GRP_EXPLN as authGrpDesc , AUTHRT_GRP_SEQ as authGrpOdr , RGTR_ID as rgtrId , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = RGTR_ID) AS regNm , FRST_INQ_DTTM as regDttm , MDFR_ID as mdfrId , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = MDFR_ID) AS modNm , MOD_DTTM as modDttm FROM TB_SYS_AUTH_GRP WHERE MENU_TYCD = #{menuType} AND USEYN = 'Y' AND USER_AUTHRT_ID IN (SELECT USER_AUTHRT_ID FROM TB_LMS_USER_AUTHRT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ) ORDER BY AUTHRT_GRP_SEQ

/* SQL ID : SysAuthGrpDAO.listNotInUser 설 명 : 해당 사용자가 부여 받지 않은 권한 목록 */ SELECT MENU_TYCD as menuType , USER_AUTHRT_ID as authGrpCd , AUTHRT_GRPNM as authGrpNm , USEYN as useYn , AUTHRT_GRP_EXPLN as authGrpDesc , AUTHRT_GRP_SEQ as authGrpOdr , RGTR_ID as rgtrId , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = RGTR_ID) AS regNm , FRST_INQ_DTTM as regDttm , MDFR_ID as mdfrId , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = MDFR_ID) AS modNm , MOD_DTTM as modDttm FROM TB_SYS_AUTH_GRP WHERE MENU_TYCD = #{menuType} AND USEYN = 'Y' AND USER_AUTHRT_ID NOT IN (SELECT USER_AUTHRT_ID FROM TB_LMS_USER_AUTHRT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ) ORDER BY AUTHRT_GRP_SEQ

/* SQL ID : SysAuthGrpDAO.select 설 명 : 시스템 권한의 정보 조회 */ SELECT MENU_TYCD as menuType , USER_AUTHRT_ID as authGrpCd , AUTHRT_GRPNM as authGrpNm , USEYN as useYn , AUTHRT_GRP_EXPLN as authGrpDesc , AUTHRT_GRP_SEQ as authGrpOdr , RGTR_ID as rgtrId , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = RGTR_ID) AS regNm , FRST_INQ_DTTM as regDttm , MDFR_ID as mdfrId , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = MDFR_ID) AS modNm , MOD_DTTM as modDttm FROM TB_SYS_AUTH_GRP WHERE MENU_TYCD = #{menuType} AND #{authGrpCd} LIKE CONCAT('%',USER_AUTHRT_ID,'%') COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci
